step_rationale: Metabolite elevation in metformin-treated CAD; systemic metabolic indicator.
mechanism: Hydroxy-alpha-sanshool elevation reflects metabolic perturbations in chronic CAD and metformin therapy.

references.title: Long-term Metformin Alters Gut Microbiota and Serum Metabolome in Coronary Artery Disease Patients After Percutaneous Coronary Intervention to Improve 5-year Prognoses: A Multi-omics Analysis.
